action_set_definitions.name: get_wastewater_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational parameters and sensor readings from the wastewater treatment environment.

action_set_definitions.name: set_aeration_intensity
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output of the aeration blowers. Increasing intensity raises Dissolved Oxygen (DO) levels to lower COD, but increases energy consumption.

power_level.description: The target blower power level as a percentage (0.0 to 100.0).

action_set_definitions.name: set_wastage_flow_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the Waste Activated Sludge (WAS) flow rate. Decreasing this rate allows the biological inventory (MLSS) to increase.

flow_rate_m3h.description: The target flow rate for sludge wastage in cubic meters per hour.

action_set_definitions.name: set_return_sludge_flow_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the Return Activated Sludge (RAS) flow rate. Used to manage the concentration of solids in the aeration tank and optimize the Sludge Settleability Index (SVI) without chemicals.

flow_rate_m3h.description: The target flow rate for returning sludge from the clarifier to the aeration tank.

state_description.influent_flow_rate: Current rate of raw wastewater entering the system (m3/h).
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_level: Concentration of oxygen in the aeration tank (mg/L).
state_description.mixed_liquor_suspended_solids: Concentration of suspended solids in the aeration tank, representing microbial biomass (mg/L).
state_description.effluent_cod: Chemical Oxygen Demand of the treated water leaving the system (mg/L).
state_description.sludge_settleability_index: Measure of how well the sludge settles in the clarifier (mL/g).
state_description.chemical_tank_level: Remaining percentage of coagulant/flocculant in the storage tank.
state_description.cumulative_energy_consumption: Total energy used by pumps and blowers since start of cycle (kWh).
